title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FurnitureMart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
